proposals.motive: The README and package.json have inconsistent license information which could lead to legal issues. This change ensures consistency by updating the license in package.json.
proposals.diff:
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 "version": "1.0.0",
 "description": "A sample project",
 "main": "index.js",
-"license": "ISC",
+"license": "MIT",
 "scripts": {
   "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1"
 },
